title: mentha guitartii
intro: Mentha guitartii, also known as Spanish mint, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family. It is native to the Iberian Peninsula and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and digestive aid properties. The health benefits of Mentha guitartii include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and nausea, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Mentha guitartii can be found in teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to calm the digestive system and promote overall well-being.
